Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows markedly elevated serum creatinine, proteinuria, ketonuria, and low urine specific gravity, suggesting significant renal impairment with possible acute or chronic kidney injury. Mild metabolic acidosis is indicated by low CO₂. No evidence of urinary tract infection is seen. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal) further support renal dysfunction. Prompt nephrological evaluation is recommended.
